themes.name: Vision
themes.description: Ability to see the bigger picture, strategic thinking, anticipating trends

behavior_indicators: Understands and can articulate the brand's market position
Identifies emerging trends relevant to their function
Connects daily work to broader brand and Group strategy
Asks strategic questions in team discussions
Translates Group strategy into actionable functional plans
Anticipates market shifts and proactively adapts team priorities
Builds cross-functional alignment on strategic initiatives
Mentors associates on strategic thinking
Shapes the brand's long-term strategic direction
Identifies transformative opportunities that create competitive advantage
Influences Group-level strategy through data-driven insights
Builds organizational capability for strategic agility

themes.name: Entrepreneurship
themes.description: Innovation mindset, calculated risk-taking, business acumen

behavior_indicators: Proposes incremental improvements to existing processes
Takes ownership of small projects and delivers results
Demonstrates curiosity about P&L impact of decisions
Learns from failures without being risk-averse
Launches new initiatives that generate measurable business value
Makes data-informed decisions balancing risk and reward
Manages budgets and resources with an owner's mindset
Champions innovation that creates new revenue streams while protecting brand equity
Drives business model innovation at brand or Group level
Creates an environment where calculated risk-taking is celebrated
Builds strategic partnerships that expand market reach
Balances short-term performance with long-term brand building

themes.name: Passion
themes.description: Deep commitment to craft and brand, emotional connection to quality

behavior_indicators: Demonstrates genuine enthusiasm for the brand's products and heritage
Go the extra mile on quality and attention to detail
Actively learns about the brand's history and DNA
Represents the brand authentically in all interactions
Inspires team members with visible commitment to craft excellence
Protects brand standards even under commercial pressure
Connects product quality to customer experience and brand loyalty
Creates rituals that celebrate craftsmanship within the team
Serves as a cultural ambassador for the brand's heritage and values
Balances passion for tradition with openness to creative evolution
Builds an organizational culture where quality is non-negotiable
Inspires the next generation of brand stewards

themes.name: Trust
themes.description: Building relationships, integrity, transparency, empowering teams

behavior_indicators: Communicates openly and honestly with peers and managers
Follows through on commitments consistently
Seeks and provides constructive feedback
Builds collaborative relationships across functions
Creates psychologically safe environments for team members
Delegates effectively and empowers direct reports
Navigates conflicts with integrity and fairness
Builds trust across brand boundaries through consistent behavior
Models transparency at the organizational level
Builds and maintains trust with external stakeholders (board, partners)
Creates governance structures that balance autonomy with accountability
Champions diversity, equity, and inclusion as trust multipliers

use_cases.name: Recruitment & Selection
use_cases.description: Competency-based interview frameworks for each level, ensuring culture fit with Group DNA while respecting brand-specific needs

use_cases.name: Performance Appraisal
use_cases.description: Annual and mid-year reviews mapped to the 4 themes, with level-appropriate expectations and development feedback

use_cases.name: Development Planning
use_cases.description: Individual development plans targeting growth from current level to next, with specific behavior milestones

use_cases.name: Inter-Brand Mobility
use_cases.description: Assessment criteria for cross-brand transfers, ensuring leaders can adapt their competencies to a new brand context
